name: Regatta
description: A fleet of little sailboats heeling in the breeze — sails re-rake and hulls rock to new angles with every redraw.

code.style: --sail: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --luff: @rand(8%, 60%); --rule: ( /* sail and hull heel together on one emitted angle */ --heel: @r(-9, 9); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 24%; bottom: 30%; width: 40%; height: 44%; background: var(--sail); clip-path: polygon(var(--luff) 0%, 100% 100%, 0% 100%); transform: rotate(calc(@var(--heel) * 1deg)); transform-origin: 50% 100%; transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 17%; bottom: 17%; width: 58%; height: 13%; background: var(--color1); border-radius: 0 0 99px 99px; transform: rotate(calc(@var(--heel) * 1deg)); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
